data.title: Create apply-attribution-trailers.sh skeleton + read_and_deduplicate + check_git_version stub
data.description: Create plugins/dso/scripts/apply-attribution-trailers.sh with: set -euo pipefail; GIT_BINARY=${GIT_BINARY:-git}; ARTIFACTS_DIR resolution; argument parsing. Implement read_and_deduplicate(): reads attribution-contributors.jsonl, groups by subagent_type/skill_name/model, returns unique values per field. Add check_git_version() STUB that returns 0 for any input (temporary placeholder — T6-impl replaces with real check; stub prevents broken intermediate states). Add schema comment block at top documenting JSONL format, multi-value vs scalar trailer classification, truncation contract. chmod +x the script. AC: (1) JSONL with 3 identical subagent_type entries -> read_and_deduplicate returns that value once (use proper JSONL input format: {"type":"agent","subagent_type":"...","model":"..."}); (2) 2 distinct subagent_type values -> both in output; (3) check_git_version stub returns 0; (4) script has GIT_BINARY=${GIT_BINARY:-git} and schema comment; (5) all T3a-test tests pass; (6) validate.sh --ci passes.
